action.reasoning: Observation: Current best is 88.66% (with MC dropout TTA). The dual-model frozen features approach has plateaued at ~89% val accuracy. Analysis: ArcFace loss adds angular margin penalty that forces better inter-class separation, which is especially beneficial for class-incremental learning where classes are similar. A larger model (2048 hidden, 3 residual blocks) provides more capacity. Decision: Retrain with ArcFace classifier (margin=0.5, scale=30), larger hidden dim (2048), 3 residual blocks, and 700 epochs. Keep MC dropout TTA in predict.py.
